data.body: COMPLETION EVIDENCE — merged to main. Gerrit change 828 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/828) is MERGED with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (submittable=True, 0 unresolved). Merged revision 88cc31390 is the tip of Gerrit main and has replicated to the GitHub mirror; .github/workflows/_build-and-test.yml is present on origin/main. All ACs met: reusable workflow_call created (lint+pip-audit+test matrix, gerrit-refspec-parameterized checkout, no secrets); test.yml and gerrit-verify.yaml both delegate to it (vote still needs build-and-test); all five test_ci_workflow_parity.py functions rewritten to the single-source invariant with the pre-commit-SKIP and optionality safety properties preserved (retargeted at the reusable); test_workflow_names.py covers _build-and-test.yml; make lint + actionlint + 42 workflow tests + pre-commit all passed. Post-merge validation of the refactored path (the branch-head lane) is being watched via the merge-triggered test.yml run. Supersedes the earlier 'Awaiting...' comment.
